name: audania-saas Changelog
notes: Per-repo changelog for the audania-saas Laravel app. Schema mirrors the project-root changelog (../../changelog.json).
The project-root changelog.html merges this file's entries into the unified timeline at render time, tagged with source='audania-saas'.

Entries are derived from git history via the Conventional Commit type (feat → added, fix/refactor/docs/chore → changed). The commit hash lives in the `commit` field; the `id` field uses the short hash for stable cross-referencing.
When a commit ships, append a new entry at the top here and re-render the root changelog.html so the merge stays current (per the project CLAUDE.md §3 changelog-stays-current rule).

related_project links back to a project-level changelog entry id when the same event has both a strategic decision (project) and a code implementation (repo) — e.g., 2026-05-11 entity decision ↔ Impressum commit.

entries.title: chore: sync changelog (post-commit hook rollup)
entries.summary: Adds the b9f3bf3 backfill commit to the per-repo changelog.

entries.title: chore(changelog): backfill related_project on 3 pre-convention commits
entries.summary: Three audania-saas commits never had a Changelog-Related-Project trailer because they predate the trailer convention introduced on 2026-05-13, even though their relationship to a parent project-decision entry is clear from each commit body:

entries.title: chore(ai): land audania-commits.md + minor stack/context fixes
entries.summary: The audania-commits.md trailer convention file was authored alongside the 2026-05-13 trailer-automation work (parent monorepo CLAUDE.md §9 / ADR 00-strategy/decisions/2026-05-13-commit-trailer-automation.md) but never staged. This commit lands it so future sessions in audania-saas pick it up via the Boost merge.

entries.title: refactor(marketing): rewrite copy in Praxis-Register, drop verbots-vocab
entries.summary: Implements the Claude Design copy iteration (2026-05-13 CD-Brief) across all marketing surfaces. PVS → Praxissoftware, Slot-Sets → Anamnese-Bereiche, Sub-Auftragsverarbeiter → Dienstleister mit Datenzugriff. KI-native / Booking-Lock-in / Funnel-Eingang / Datenresidenz / MDR-by-design / Health-Fintech removed from Praxis-facing copy. 13 files touched across hero, how, anatomy, compliance, vs, cta, footer, journeys.

entries.title: test: synthetic commit to validate the changelog post-commit hook
entries.summary: This is a one-off test of the changelog automation. The post-commit hook should fire after this commit, the script should parse the trailers below and create a new entry in 30-code/audania-saas/changelog.json with effort=15m, public=false, tags=[claude-design,test-fixture], related_project pointing at the script-introduction entry.

entries.title: chore: sync changelog (post-commit hook rollup)
entries.summary: Folds the post-commit hook's auto-generated changelog.json entry for the previous README rewrite commit (040da5f) into history. The hook adds new entries after each commit but leaves them as a dirty working-tree change; this commit captures that state so the repo isn't permanently ahead of its own changelog file.

entries.title: docs(readme): rewrite README for Audania identity
entries.summary: Replaced the upstream Laravel default README (Laravel logo, generic framework description, MIT note) with an Audania-specific README that:

entries.title: feat: add Datenschutzerklärung page and wire footer link
entries.summary: Implements the Datenschutz design from the Claude Design handoff bundle as a Blade route group page at /datenschutz. Mirrors the Impressum pattern: hero + sticky TOC + six chapters with eyebrow rails, plus DPF cards, LegalBasisGrid, Art. 21 callout, CookieGrid, LogFields, MDR closing note. 1244 lines inserted.

entries.title: refactor(marketing): rename Datenschutz trust section to Vertrauen
entries.summary: Disambiguates the marketing trust section from the DSGVO Datenschutzerklärung Pflichttext: section anchor and nav label become Vertrauen, footer 'Sicherheit' link points to the new #vertrauen anchor.

entries.title: docs(ai): pin operating entity as Mike Esser Trading & Consulting
entries.summary: Engineering-side mirror of the project-level entity decision (parent monorepo CLAUDE.md §9, 2026-05-11). Captures the brand-vs-legal-entity split so Impressum, Datenschutz, AVV template, Stripe-EU billing, sub-processor list, and contract/email 'From' lines all name the legal entity. Re-decision trigger documented for the day the entity ever becomes a GmbH.

entries.title: feat: add Impressum page and fix footer entity name
entries.summary: New /impressum route translating the Claude Design Impressum spec into Blade with anchored §1–§6 rows (Diensteanbieter, Kontakt, USt-IdNr, V.i.S.d.P., VSBG, DSA). Names the legal entity 'Mike Esser Trading & Consulting' per the 2026-05-11 entity decision; product brand 'Audania' stays in UI. Fixes the shared marketing footer that contradicted it: drops 'Audania GmbH · Berlin · HRB —' and the © GmbH line.

entries.title: fix: route marketing header anchors through home so they work cross-page
entries.summary: Brand wordmark and section anchors lived as bare fragments (#top, #how, #datenschutz), so on /wie-audania-denkt they had no homepage to scroll to. Prefix them with the marketing.home route and point the brand at the home route directly.

entries.title: fix: serve self-hosted fonts via Vite asset pipeline
entries.summary: laravel-vite-plugin sets publicDir:false on the dev server, so /public/fonts/ @font-face files were unreachable from audania-saas.test:5173 — browser silently fell back to system fonts. Moved .ttf files into resources/fonts/ with relative @font-face URLs so Vite serves them in dev and emits fingerprinted copies under /build/assets/ in prod. DSGVO posture unchanged: fonts remain self-hosted.

entries.title: feat: add "Drei Patientenpfade" architecture walkthrough page
entries.summary: Animated three-lane walkthrough (Patient | LLM Slot-Fill | Policy) that plays the same architecture across three patient journeys (Frau Schneider DE, Herr Yılmaz TR, Lena 8 with mother). Shows that the LLM only converts unstructured text → JSON; next question, red-flag matching, schema selection stays in deterministic policy. Reachable at /wie-audania-denkt, linked from header. 2621 lines inserted.

entries.title: feat: build Audania marketing landing page
entries.summary: Translates the Claude Design handoff prototype into a Blade route group on `/` per the marketing-as-route decision. Ships self-hosted Fraunces + Inter (no Google/Bunny CDN, DSGVO), design-system tokens via Tailwind v4 @theme, and a vanilla JS slot-filling demo mirroring the React prototype's typing → saved → Befund cycle. 2545 lines inserted across hero, how, anatomy, compliance, vs, cta, footer, header components.

entries.title: chore: adopt Laravel Boost extension model for AI guidelines
entries.summary: Move Audania-specific AI context into .ai/guidelines/ as source of truth (audania-context, audania-hard-rules, audania-stack) and ignore the Boost-generated artefacts (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .mcp.json, boost.json, junie/, .claude/skills/) so boost:install / boost:update can regenerate them cleanly.

entries.title: first commit — Laravel 13 + Boost scaffold
entries.summary: Initial repository: Laravel 13 application scaffold (composer create-project), Boost installed with default skills (laravel-best-practices, pest-testing, tailwindcss-development), boost.json + .mcp.json + initial CLAUDE.md generated. Mostly install operations rather than authored code.
